meaning: vt.再打折扣,重贴现n.再折扣,重新贴现,重贴现后的票据
examples: At the same time, lowered the central bank refinancing and rediscount interest rates.
In chapter two, I discuss western negotiable instrument market and rediscount policy.

The firm dollar is the equivalent of two bumps for the rediscount rate.
